summary: RSS- and curl-based local search. No API key, no provider SDK; queries operator-curated feeds.

requires.install: Install curl from your OS package manager (apt/brew/winget).

notes: Operator-curated feed list lives at .maddu/mcp/local-search/feeds.json. Replace the sample HN feed with whatever you want indexed. No external API keys required.
hardRuleNotes: Rule #5 OK: no provider SDK; just curl + JSON over RSS.
Rule #3 OK: local subprocess; no hosted backend dependency.
Rule #4 OK: no new package.json dep (stdlib + curl).
